symptoms: - c.Skip("race detected, skip it temporarily and fix it before 20210619")
failure_signature: - c.Skip("race detected, skip it temporarily and fix it before 20210619")
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates `executor/parallel_apply_test` from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. The test has an explicit skip note about race detection; framework migration / suite refactor is often a prerequisite to properly fix and re-enable previously skipped unstable tests.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy gocheck-based executor tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: - c.Skip("race detected, skip it temporarily and fix it before 20210619")
